title: EntryFileIO for SequenceFile Management
description: The 'lib/output/committer/manifest/impl' directory houses the 'EntryFileIO.java' file, which is pivotal for managing 'FileEntry' objects in Hadoop's MapReduce framework. The 'EntryFileIO' class offers functionalities for writing and reading these entries to and from a SequenceFile. It includes an 'EntryWriter' class that uses a blocking queue for managing entries, processed by a dedicated thread for writing to the SequenceFile. The class provides methods for creating writers and readers, iterating over entries, and managing a writer thread. It relies on various Java and Hadoop classes for its operations, and collaborates with other classes in the same package for comprehensive file entry management.

TITLE: EntryFileIO for SequenceFile Management

DESCRIPTION: 
The 'lib/output/committer/manifest/impl' directory houses the 'EntryFileIO.java' file, which is pivotal for managing 'FileEntry' objects in Hadoop's MapReduce framework. The 'EntryFileIO' class offers functionalities for writing and reading these entries to and from a SequenceFile. It includes an 'EntryWriter' class that uses a blocking queue for managing entries, processed by a dedicated thread for writing to the SequenceFile. The class provides methods for creating writers and readers, iterating over entries, and managing a writer thread. It relies on various Java and Hadoop classes for its operations, and collaborates with other classes in the same package for comprehensive file entry management.
